description_long: This is a tall, elegant floor lamp with a black cylindrical lampshade adorned with a gold Medusa head motif, reminiscent of Versace's iconic design. The lampshade features subtle gold trim along its top and bottom edges, adding a touch of luxury. The lamp's base is slender and flares out at the bottom, finished in a matching black with gold accent bands that echo the shade's detailing. The overall silhouette is classic yet opulent, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces. The lamp appears to be constructed primarily from metal for the base and frame, with a fabric or composite material for the shade. Its design is both functional and decorative, serving as a statement piece in any setting.
description: A tall black floor lamp with a gold-trimmed cylindrical shade featuring a prominent Medusa head motif and a slender, flared base with gold accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Medusa head motif centered on the black lampshade and the full height of the slender, flared base.
description_view_1: Side view with the Medusa motif partially visible on the left edge of the shade, highlighting the lamp's cylindrical form and gold trim.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with the Medusa motif visible but off-center, emphasizing the continuous gold trim and the lamp's elegant profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Medusa motif just visible on the right edge, showing the smooth, uninterrupted black surface of the shade.
